title: ReLand ResourcePack!
description: Texturepack that updates the 1.12 textures to the 1.14 ones. It also add custom menu, GUI, and easter eggs referencing the server
body:
**ENGLISH**

This a (Spanish) texturepack updates the textures from 1.12 to the new ones from 1.14. Adds a custom menu, original GUI, and Easter Eggs from original server members

**SPANISH**

Este texturepack actualiza las texturas de la 1.12 a las nuevas de la 1.14. Añade un menu personalizado, GUI original, y Easter Eggs de los miembros originales del servidor
